flashcards.definition: arctan(Im/Re); the angle of a complex number or signal in the complex plane.
θ = arccos(P/S); relates real power to apparent power in AC circuits.
θ = arctan(reactance / resistance); describes the phase between voltage and current.
Using arcsin to calculate steering angles for phased antenna arrays.
Using inverse trig to determine joint angles in mechanical linkages from known lengths.
